prompt: A critical review of the cost-security detectors found correctness bugs in two places: the tool-error-rate breaker in @prune/cost-security, and the identical-action loop detector in @prune/intelligence. Both packages have failing tests specifying the corrected behavior; fix both detectors.
oracleCmd: (cd packages/cost-security && npx vitest run src/tool-error.test.ts) && (cd packages/intelligence && npx vitest run src/identical-action.test.ts)
notes: Reference: fix(cost-security) critical-review fixes 2026-06-07. Two-package debug task.
